positive_prompt: Set error text color to #FF4D4F, font-size to 12px, margin-top to 4px, line-height to 1.5, display block, and add an SVG warning icon 14x14px aligned center with the text.
negative_taboo: 避免：Make the error message look obvious and red.

positive_prompt: Set headline font-family to Inter, font-size to 32px at mobile breakpoint, line-height to 1.1, letter-spacing to -0.02em, text-align to center, and max-width to 300px.
negative_taboo: 避免：Make the headline typography feel premium and readable on mobile.
